description: Nested <each> (§42). Outer iterates @groups; inner iterates group.items off the per-item alias. Two groups render two .group sections; the inner eaches render 2 + 1 = 3 .item rows total.
rationale: §42 a nested <each in=group.items> over an outer alias field renders the inner list per outer item. Whole-tree shows two impl#1 each-container <div> layers (outer + inner); anchored counts are wrapper-agnostic.
